name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones Pro
description: Over-ear noise-cancelling headphones with 40-hour battery life, foldable design, and premium sound quality. Compatible with all Bluetooth 5.0 devices.

name: Smart USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI 4K, 3x USB-A 3.0, SD card reader, PD charging 100W. Plug and play, no drivers needed.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB
description: Compact TKL mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Blue switches, full RGB backlight, N-key rollover, and braided USB cable. Great for gaming and typing.

name: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: Ergonomic vertical mouse with 2.4GHz wireless, 6 programmable buttons, 800-3200 DPI, and 12-month battery life on a single AA battery.

name: Portable Power Bank 20000mAh
description: Slim 20000mAh power bank with 65W PD fast charging, dual USB-A, USB-C output. Charges a laptop once and a phone 4-5 times.

name: 27-inch IPS Monitor 4K
description: 27-inch 4K UHD IPS monitor with 99% sRGB, HDR400, 60Hz, USB-C 65W charging port, height-adjustable stand. Ideal for design and productivity.

name: Webcam 1080p with Ring Light
description: Full HD 1080p webcam with built-in ring light, dual microphones with noise reduction, autofocus, and wide 90° field of view. Plug and play USB.

name: Desk Lamp with Wireless Charger
description: LED desk lamp with 10W Qi wireless charger base, 5 brightness levels, 3 colour temperatures, USB-A port, and flexible gooseneck arm.

name: Laptop Stand Adjustable Aluminium
description: Solid aluminium laptop stand, compatible with 10-17 inch laptops, 7 height angles, foldable, non-slip rubber pads. Improves posture and airflow.

name: True Wireless Earbuds ANC
description: Active noise cancelling earbuds with 8-hour playtime (32h with case), IPX5 water resistance, touch controls, and transparency mode.

name: USB Microphone Condenser
description: Cardioid condenser USB microphone for streaming, podcasting, and remote work. Includes desk stand, pop filter, and headphone monitoring jack.

name: Smart WiFi Plug 16A
description: 16A smart WiFi plug with energy monitoring, timer, and schedule. Works with Alexa, Google Home, and the Hubmicroo app. No hub required.

name: Cable Management Box Large
description: Large desktop cable management box hides power strips, routers, and cables. Made from ABS plastic, ventilated lid, two side cable holes.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker Waterproof
description: 360° sound portable speaker with IP67 waterproofing, 24-hour battery, dual pairing mode, and built-in microphone for calls.

name: Screen Cleaning Kit
description: Microfibre cloth + 100ml cleaning spray safe for all screens including OLED. Anti-static, streak-free formula.

name: Wrist Rest Keyboard & Mouse Set
description: Memory foam wrist rest set for keyboard and mouse. Non-slip base, lycra surface, relieves wrist strain during long typing sessions.
